repo_prior_art.cite: none; no in-catalogue Lee principal-selection odds-ratio envelope found

published_prior_art.cite: none; routine 2x2 odds-ratio algebra, explicitly acknowledged as non-flagship

repo_prior_art.cite: closest adjacent entries are pid_ordinal_principal_strata_v1 and pid_rdd_manipulation_bounded_v1, but neither targets Lee always-selected principal strata

published_prior_art.cite: Lee2009SampleSelection, LaffersNedela2017Sensitivity, HuberMellace2015SharpSelection, Semenova2025GeneralizedLee, Okamoto2025RobustifyLee, and Shepherd beta/psi papers are close but do not give the alpha-coupled finite Gamma,kappa frontier

repo_prior_art.cite: none; ManskiNonparametricBounds_Study is only a bounded-outcome comparator

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1 / Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The drafter emitted no mandated 4-10 paper literature checklist mapped to §8 statements; §5 is broad, but the published-axis audit is not reproducible from the required handoff.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: tier=field below novelty_target=flagship; the current kernel is a new sharp sensitivity curve for a self-defined Gamma,kappa restriction, not yet a flagship-eligible open-regime result, iff estimator frontier, or strict extension explicitly left open by a named paper.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Add the missing mapped literature checklist and include closer stress-test comparators such as Honoré-Hu 2020 Selection Without Exclusion and Egleston-Scharfstein-Freeman-West 2007 SACE odds-ratio sensitivity.

Turn the beta/psi comparison into an if-and-only-if frontier: name two published workflows and give an observable threshold where they equal the Gamma,kappa frontier and prove strict non-equivalence off that threshold.
Add a quantitative robustness corollary for Job Corps-style Lee analyses: the minimal Gamma or kappa at which the Lee-sign conclusion can flip.
If flagship is required, extend beyond binary Y or prove a strict extension of a class that Okamoto, Semenova, or Laffers-Nedela explicitly leave open.

recommended_next_step: Revise the proposal around a flagship-eligible prior-art gap and supply the missing mapped literature checklist; the mathematical kernel is not dead.
